name: mock-shop
description: A toy 'shop' backend (products / cart / checkout). The reference SUT plugin proving the framework is domain-agnostic: it provides BOTH a runtime to test and source to read.

source.note: For a real backend this points at a checked-out clone read by design + diagnostics.

runtime.note: in_process: the framework boots the mock itself. 'isolate' is POSTed before each case for a clean new_user state (was hardcoded in the runner; now a plugin concern). A real plugin uses {"mode":"remote","base_url":"https://..."}.

creds.note: The mock needs no auth. A real plugin resolves a token here (env var / Vault / etc.).
